# saas-dev

> Enterprise SaaS scaffolding skills for Django + React + Flutter — 107 reference files, 15 skills, full PRD → complete app automation pipeline.

## What is saas-dev?

saas-dev is a Claude Code skills marketplace plugin that packages production-grade Django + React + Flutter SaaS patterns as agent skills. It covers the enterprise baseline (audit logs, 2FA, multi-tenancy, feature flags, full-text search, webhooks, encryption, structured logging, Prometheus metrics, distributed tracing, database pooling, Kubernetes deployment, GDPR compliance) plus a full PRD → app automation pipeline with premium futuristic UI (glassmorphism, aurora, neumorphism).

## Install

- Claude Code: `/plugin marketplace add Ayithamsetty-Vamsi-krishna/claude-skills`
- Antigravity / Cursor / Codex / Gemini CLI: `git clone` then copy `plugins/saas-dev/skills/saas-dev` to your tool's skills directory

## Repository

- URL: https://github.com/Ayithamsetty-Vamsi-krishna/claude-skills
- Version: 4.3.1
- License: MIT

## PRD → Complete App Pipeline

Upload your Business PRD + Technical PRD (PDF, DOCX, or MD format). Say "build from PRD".

1. saas-dev-orchestrator reads both PRDs silently
2. Extracts all features, builds dependency graph
3. Saves BUILD_PLAN.md (full feature breakdown + sub-tasks + schedule)
4. Asks user: build all / pick specific / reorder
5. Loops for each feature: brainstorm → plan → execute
6. Auto-marks complete after tests pass, notifies user (reject/pause options)
7. Updates BUILD_PLAN.md and CLAUDE.md after each feature
8. Final v1.0.0 tag when all features done

## Pipeline Skills

- **using-saas-dev**: Bootstrap — loads at session start, auto-wires all skills
- **saas-dev-orchestrator**: PRD → complete app. Reads PDF/DOCX/MD PRDs. BUILD_PLAN.md. Feature dependency graph.
- **saas-dev-brainstorm**: Socratic design using ask_user_input_v0. Reads PRDs + design files. Saves spec.
- **saas-dev-plan**: Breaks spec into 2-5 min narrative tasks (zero code snippets). Saves plan.
- **saas-dev-execute**: Fresh subagent per task + specialist skill + design file. Two-stage review.

## Frontend UI Skills

- **saas-dev-ui-react**: Premium React + Next.js UI. Glassmorphism, aurora, neumorphism, bento grid. Framer Motion. Landing pages (8 sections). Dashboards. Integrates ui-ux-pro-max.
- **saas-dev-ui-flutter**: Premium Flutter UI. Glassmorphism with BackdropFilter. flutter_animate staggered lists. go_router smooth transitions. Riverpod state. AppTokens design system. iOS + Android + Web.

## Specialist Backend Skills

- **django-project-setup**: New project scaffolding with 8 Phase 0 questions. CLAUDE.md v2 generation.
- **django-backend-dev**: DRF Generics, BaseModel, AuditMixin, SoftDeleteMixin, dual FK serializers, audit log, multi-tenancy, feature flags, Postgres FTS, Elasticsearch, field encryption, GDPR
- **django-auth-dev**: Pattern C multi-user auth (StaffUser + CustomerUser), 2FA via django-otp, JWT, RBAC
- **django-integrations-dev**: Stripe, S3, email, JWT-signed webhooks, PDF (WeasyPrint + ReportLab), Celery, Redis
- **django-devops-dev**: structlog, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, Sentry, PgBouncer, blue/green, Kubernetes

## CLAUDE.md v2

Structured project memory: schema_version, project_metadata, skill_version_used, dependency_registry, environment_variables, third_party_integrations, architecture_decisions (ADR-lite), known_issues, recent_changes. Updated after every feature.

## Compatible Tools

Claude Code, Google Antigravity, Cursor, OpenAI Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Amp, Kiro, Windsurf

## Author

Ayithamsetty Vamsi Krishna — https://github.com/Ayithamsetty-Vamsi-krishna
